evidence: "Great movie about Jesus that is not shown on tv anymore."
"I love Supernatural. It cannot be bad. It's all good!"
"It's not high tech, and it tells a good story."
"The story was ok, but the effects blew me away!"
"I wish there was more, but the series is great."
"I still love watching this series over and over."
"I was very impressed. The scenery was awesome and the acting was top notch."
"I love this series. It brings back so many memories."
"I can't wait to see season 6 if I can find it at a reasonable price."
"I remember this movie so much. We used to watch it on TV."
"What a sweet story, that started out despicable and turned into a very sweet story. I loved it."
"I still laugh at the outrageous antics of Serena, Uncle Authur, and Endora."

summary: The user has a strong preference for historical and supernatural genres, particularly enjoying stories that evoke nostalgia and emotional resonance. They appreciate high production quality and tend to favor simple narratives with a slower pacing, often reflecting on the impact of classic series and films.
